rationale: The candidate is bounded, dependencies are known, and rollback is defined.
existing_assumptions: List every assumption that the implementation depends on.

data_migration.notes: Explain migration or why none is required.

external_interfaces: List APIs, repositories, services, file formats, and human handoffs.
approval_changes: List any authority or approval boundary that changes.
public_documents: List public claims, product pages, contracts, or documentation affected.
regression_tests: Name the checks that prove existing behavior still works.
hidden_dependencies: Record discovered coupling, old records, implicit behavior, and operational constraints.
rollback_boundary: Define the last known-good commit, data state, and safe rollback action.
completion_conditions: Define one bounded completion condition per independently verifiable result.
risks: Record the largest failure modes and how they will be detected.
